series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains source material, research, and final, original work products, e.g., work-sample and scenario exercises, questionnaires, and exams developed for the purpose of conducting pre-employment screenings and assessing applicant or employee competencies and performance. NOTE: Results of completed assessments are retained separately in accordance with Employee Personnel File (SAN 760-1288), Application for Employment Bid Folder (SAN 760-1492), or Promotional Exams and Assessments (SAN 760-0831), as applicable.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in OSHP Office of Personnel superseded or obsolete. ; Electronic: in OSHP Office of Personnel superseded or obsolete
